description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These teal blue leather sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts and skirts. The leather panels with the cut outs and appliqued patches are perfect for everyday wear.UpperLeather bands with cut outs and applique patches over the forefoot and has perforations on the midfootElastic band looped through the forefoot leather strap and attached to the ankle strap for a snug FitSoft leather lining for added comfortCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelGrooved floral pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
